codeReview.summary: The feature commit cleanly adds end-to-end read_dwg() regression coverage for the remaining resolution cross-area fail-closed/public-boundary cases. The new tests match the existing parser pipeline and complement the pre-existing supported-fixture success coverage already present in the same integration test file.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature is tagged with the dwg-fixture-worker skill, but the implementation is test-only coverage over existing parser behavior rather than fixture-generation work. The skill still fit well enough, yet the transcript shows a test/regression task rather than adding or refining fixtures/manifests, so the skill boundaries are somewhat fuzzy for end-to-end parser coverage features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature metadata uses skillName dwg-fixture-worker; commit b14a6ca only updates crates/h7cad-native-dwg/tests/read_headers.rs with two new end-to-end assertions and no new fixture assets.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, commit b14a6ca, and the affected DWG integration test file. The change correctly adds missing end-to-end fail-closed/read_dwg public-boundary coverage for invalid magic, unsupported versions, truncated section directories, and out-of-bounds payload spans, while relying on already-existing supported-fixture success tests for the positive cross-area path. No blocking or non-blocking code issues were found.
